registry_id.description: Primary key of the job row in the SmartTwin job registry (preferred lookup).

work_dir.description: Absolute work_dir of the job. Used as fallback when registry_id is not known.

ranks.description: Which ranks to return. Unset (default) → representative heuristic (rank 0 + up to 3 ranks matching highlight). Use [-1] to mean 'all detected ranks'. Otherwise, explicit list of rank IDs.

lines.description: Number of trailing lines to keep per rank. Default 200, max 5000.

highlight.description: Filter class used by the representative heuristic and per-rank match. 'errors' = ERROR/Traceback/CUDA_ERROR/RuntimeError/Exception; 'ncc' = NCCL WARN/ERROR; 'oom' = OOM / 'out of memory' / 'cuda ... out of memory'; 'none' = no filter (only rank 0 auto-selected).
